moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Kicks On
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is currently underway across Canada, Mexico, and the United States, with group stage matches dominating the global football calendar.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: World Cup fever is in full swing! Who are you backing for glory this year as the group stages heat up?

angles.name: Match Day Build-up
angles.copy: Another day, another set of crucial World Cup fixtures! Grab your snacks, it's kick-off time soon.

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival kicks off today, running until June 21st, featuring headliners Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure.

angles.name: Festival Gates Open
angles.copy: It's here! The Isle of Wight Festival gates are officially open. Who's heading to Seaclose Park this weekend for Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris & The Cure?

angles.name: IOW Line-up
angles.copy: Dreaming of the Isle of Wight Festival? Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure and so many more are ready to rock the island. Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Starts Tomorrow
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival takes over Glasgow Green from tomorrow, June 19th to 21st, with Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi headlining.

angles.name: Glasgow Get Ready
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready? TRNSMT Festival kicks off tomorrow with Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi leading the charge on Glasgow Green!

angles.name: TRNSMT Anticipation
angles.copy: The countdown to TRNSMT is almost over! Who's joining the crowds in Glasgow for three days of incredible live music this weekend?

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: The world-renowned Glastonbury Festival is set to open its gates next week, from June 24th to 28th, bringing a massive lineup to Worthy Farm.

angles.name: Glasto Countdown
angles.copy: The Pyramid Stage is calling! Glastonbury Festival is just days away. Who's got their wellies packed and their camping gear ready for Worthy Farm?

angles.name: Next Week's Big Gig
angles.copy: Next week, the biggest festival on the planet, Glastonbury, takes over. What's your top tip for surviving (and thriving at) Glasto?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, is well underway, airing nightly at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX after starting on June 1st.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another night, more drama in the Love Island villa! Who's coupled up, who's cracking on, and who's giving you the ick tonight?

angles.name: Love Island Chat
angles.copy: Love Island is providing all the summer gossip! What's been the biggest shocker from the villa so far?

moments.title: Paul McCartney is 84 Today
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles and Wings co-frontman, Sir Paul McCartney, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Macca
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the living legend, Sir Paul McCartney! What's your all-time favourite Beatles or Wings track?

angles.name: Paul McCartney's Legacy
angles.copy: From 'Yesterday' to 'Live and Let Die', Paul McCartney's songwriting genius spans decades. Celebrating his 84th birthday today!

moments.title: Lionel Richie Turns 77
moments.blurb: Soul and R&B icon Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'All Night Long' and 'Hello,' will celebrate his 77th birthday on Saturday, June 20th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Lionel
angles.copy: Get ready to dance 'All Night Long'! Lionel Richie turns 77 this Saturday. What's the ultimate Lionel track that always gets you singing?

angles.name: Commodores & Solo Hits
angles.copy: From The Commodores to a phenomenal solo career, Lionel Richie's impact on music is undeniable. Wishing him a very happy 77th for Saturday!

moments.title: Summer Solstice on Sunday
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs this Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day Incoming
angles.copy: Get ready for maximum daylight! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, June 21st. How are you planning to make the most of the longest day of the year?

angles.name: Midsummer Magic
angles.copy: Midsummer is almost here! The Summer Solstice on Sunday brings us the most daylight. Perfect for those long summer evenings.

moments.title: Lana Del Rey Turns 41
moments.blurb: Critically acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic and cinematic style, celebrates her 41st birthday this Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Lana
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey this Sunday! What's your favourite track from the 'Queen of Melancholia'?

angles.name: Lana's Cinematic Sound
angles.copy: From 'Video Games' to her latest album, Lana Del Rey's unique sound continues to captivate. Wishing her a very happy 41st for Sunday!

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper is 73
moments.blurb: The flamboyant pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time,' celebrates her 73rd birthday on Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: She's so unusual! Cyndi Lauper turns 73 this Monday. What's your favourite anthem from this colourful pop legend?

angles.name: Pop Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper for Monday! Her hits still sound as vibrant as ever.

moments.title: Jason Mraz Turns 49
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, known for global hits like 'I'm Yours' and 'Lucky,' will celebrate his 49th birthday on Tuesday, June 23rd.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Jason
angles.copy: You know the words! Jason Mraz celebrates his 49th birthday this Tuesday. What's your go-to track from the 'I'm Yours' singer?

angles.name: Mraz's Melodies
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 49th birthday to Jason Mraz for Tuesday! His acoustic vibes and catchy tunes defined an era.

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, will celebrate her 33rd birthday on Friday, June 26th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ariana
angles.copy: One of the biggest voices in pop turns 33 this Friday! Happy Birthday to Ariana Grande! What's your favourite song from her incredible catalogue?

angles.name: Pop Queen Birthday
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to global pop sensation, Ariana Grande continues to dominate. Wishing her a fabulous 33rd birthday for Friday!
